frontmatter.title: Find One Missing Number in a Range
frontmatter.description: Given an array containing n distinct integers in the range [0, n], one number is missing from the array. Find the missing number.

frontmatter.title: Check if Duplicate Element Exists in an Array
frontmatter.description: Given an array of integers, check if the array contains any duplicates.

frontmatter.title: Find all the Pairs with Given Sum
frontmatter.description: Given a list of integers, find all pairs with given sum.
